data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of issuing a certificate upon completion, contingent on achieving 80% attendance. While the evidence indicates that Sarah attended 4 out of 5 sessions, which meets the attendance threshold, there is no explicit evidence of a certificate being issued or the process for issuing such a certificate. This lack of confirmation leads to a gap in satisfying the requirement, as the expected result was not met.
gaps: No evidence of a certificate being issued upon completion of the course.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
